parameters.content:
# CalmFalcon Eval 1 — Automated Checks
Run after the main pipeline. Fetches the latest output from Supabase and runs 11 structural checks — no API cost, completes in seconds.

**Checks:** Theme count · Required fields · Signal type diversity · Confidence distribution · Citation coverage · Citation URL format · Signal ID format (hallucination check) · Actionability language · Brief word count · Brief sections · WoW continuation rate

nodes.name: Fetch Latest Data
nodes.notes: Fetches latest pipeline_run, all themes for that week, and the weekly brief from Supabase.

nodes.name: Run Automated Checks
nodes.notes: 11 checks: theme count, required fields, type diversity, confidence distribution, citation coverage, URL format, signal ID hallucination, actionability language, brief word count, brief sections, WoW rate.

nodes.name: Format Report
nodes.notes: Outputs a markdown eval report. Check the node output panel to read it.

nodes.name: Save Report to Supabase
nodes.notes: Inserts one row into eval_reports. Run CREATE TABLE from supabase-schema.sql first.
